title: pinus sylvestris var. plana
intro: Pinus sylvestris var. plana, also known as the Scots pine dwarf, is a variety of evergreen coniferous tree that belongs to the Pinus sylvestris species. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The Scots pine dwarf is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
